backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the application's core data types (Application, Customer, UserProfile) and canister endpoints for profile management, application submission, payment handling, and admin operations, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the Customer type by adding paymentStatus, paymentDate, and receiptId fields, defaulting existing records to paymentStatus='pending' and null payment fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (useMarkPaymentSuccess hook, Mark as Paid button in AdminPage, ReceiptPage) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each page, component, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point applying Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vijay Online Centre React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing QueryClientProvider, page-based routing across home/payment/admin/receipt pages, admin authentication gating, and conditional Header/Footer rendering with an AdminLoginModal.
Modal dialog component for admin login with username/password fields, show/hide password toggle, error display, and submission delegated to the useAdminAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: Empty file placeholder for a floating chatbot widget component.
frontend/src/components/CustomerAuthModa: Empty file placeholder for the customer authentication modal component.
Empty file placeholder for the floating support widget component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, a list of popular services, contact details, and a copyright line with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, nav links (Home, Apply Now), and admin login/logout/dashboard controls that adapt based on authentication state, including a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Hook managing admin authentication with hardcoded credential fallback, persisting token/role/expiry in localStorage with a 24-hour TTL, and exposing login, logout, and token-validation helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity React context and provider that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on customers: fetching all customers, submitting new ones, and updating status, amount, or full customer records via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining CSS custom properties for a navy/saffron dark theme, and adding Tailwind base/components/utilities plus fade-in animation and scrollbar-hide utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all customers with filtering, search, and editing capabilities, allowing admins to update customer status, amounts, and mark payments as successful.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a searchable grid of 32 government and utility services offered by Vijay Online Centre, navigating to the payment page on service selection.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Multi-step page (form → payment → success) that collects customer details, generates a UPI QR code for payment, submits the customer record, and auto-redirects to the receipt page.
frontend/src/pages/ReceiptPage.tsx: Receipt page that fetches customer data and renders a printable/downloadable payment receipt with customer details, receipt ID, and payment status.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (saffron, navy), fonts, border radii, shadows, and animations for the application's design system.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for the Vijay Online Centre app, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and requirements for the automatic UPI payment receipt system.
